desc: 618 GPU substitution fraud dispute (Zhao Lei ordered A100 80GB, received A40 48GB three times) — 4 dynamic updates, 5 preference rules (P1-P5: table/JSON format, timestamp naming, evidence-first, quantitative, terse), v2 difficulty mechanisms M1–M6.

rounds.question: Based on order-history-618.md, package-tracking-log.md, and payment-records.md, which of the following statements about the order, shipment, and payment timeline are supported by documentary evidence?

feedback.correct: A: Confirmed by order-history-618.md (order JD-618-2026-7891234, SKU GPU-A100-80G, 2026-06-18 10:02:33, ¥72,999.00). B: Confirmed by payment-records.md (2026-06-18 10:02:45, ¥72,999.00). C: Confirmed by package-tracking-log.md (first shipment dispatch and sign times). D: All three shipments confirmed in package-tracking-log.md with same warehouse and label text. E: Only one RMA exists in order-history-618.md.

options.F: Incorrect: package-tracking-log.md shows the internal code field is GPU-A40-48G for all three shipments — contradicting the order. This is the core substitution evidence.
options.A: Correct. Order JD-618-2026-7891234 was placed on 2026-06-18 10:02:33 CST for NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU (SKU: GPU-A100-80G) at the 618 promotional price of ¥72,999.00.
options.B: Correct. Payment of ¥72,999.00 was processed via Alipay at 2026-06-18 10:02:45 CST to '京东自营GPU旗舰店' — 12 seconds after the order timestamp.
options.C: Correct. The first shipment (SF-2026-0619-88761) was dispatched on 2026-06-19 08:30:00 CST and signed by Zhao Lei in person at 2026-06-20 11:45:00 CST.
options.D: Correct. All three shipments (SF-2026-0619-88761, SF-2026-0622-88922, SF-2026-0625-89103) were dispatched from '上海松江仓储中心' and described on the shipping label as 'NVIDIA 专业显卡'.
options.E: Correct. RMA-2026-0620-001 was created on 2026-06-20 14:15:00 CST with reason '发货错误', and is the only RMA record in the order system for this order.

options.A: Order JD-618-2026-7891234 was placed on 2026-06-18 10:02:33 CST for NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU (SKU: GPU-A100-80G) at the 618 promotional price of ¥72,999.00.
options.B: Payment of ¥72,999.00 was processed via Alipay at 2026-06-18 10:02:45 CST to '京东自营GPU旗舰店' — 12 seconds after the order timestamp.
options.C: The first shipment (SF-2026-0619-88761) was dispatched on 2026-06-19 08:30:00 CST and signed by Zhao Lei in person at 2026-06-20 11:45:00 CST.
options.D: All three shipments (SF-2026-0619-88761, SF-2026-0622-88922, SF-2026-0625-89103) were dispatched from '上海松江仓储中心' and described on the shipping label as 'NVIDIA 专业显卡'.
options.E: RMA-2026-0620-001 was created on 2026-06-20 14:15:00 CST with reason '发货错误', and is the only RMA record in the order system for this order.
options.F: The internal logistics system code field on all three waybills correctly shows GPU-A100-80G, matching the original order.

rounds.question: Based on order-history-618.md, package-tracking-log.md, and product-listing-screenshot.md, which of the following statements about the product substitution pattern are supported by documentary evidence?

feedback.correct: A–E are all directly supported by the initial workspace documents. The three-shipment pattern with consistent internal code GPU-A40-48G, vague labels, same warehouse, and partial refund at A40 price all constitute the substitution evidence.

options.F: Incorrect: package-tracking-log.md explicitly notes the internal code field is '[注: 此字段仅物流系统内部可见]' — it is NOT visible to buyers on the standard tracking page.
options.A: Correct. The order system records SKU GPU-A100-80G (A100 80GB), but all three logistics internal codes show GPU-A40-48G (A40 48GB) — a systematic mismatch across every shipment.
options.B: Correct. The product listing screenshot (截图1) taken at 2026-06-18 10:00:15 CST — 2 minutes before ordering — shows the A100 listed at ¥72,999.00 with no 'product substitution' or 'same-series replacement' clause.
options.C: Correct. The shipping labels deliberately use the vague description 'NVIDIA 专业显卡' without specifying the exact GPU model, which obscures the product code mismatch from the recipient.
options.D: Correct. All three shipments originated from '上海松江仓储中心' — the same warehouse — ruling out a warehouse routing error as the explanation.
options.E: Correct. The partial refund of ¥32,000.00 (visible in payment-records.md) matches the A40's approximate market price, not the ¥72,999.00 paid for the A100.

options.A: The order system records SKU GPU-A100-80G (A100 80GB), but all three logistics internal codes show GPU-A40-48G (A40 48GB) — a systematic mismatch across every shipment.
options.B: The product listing screenshot (截图1) taken at 2026-06-18 10:00:15 CST — 2 minutes before ordering — shows the A100 listed at ¥72,999.00 with no 'product substitution' or 'same-series replacement' clause.
options.C: The shipping labels deliberately use the vague description 'NVIDIA 专业显卡' without specifying the exact GPU model, which obscures the product code mismatch from the recipient.
options.D: All three shipments originated from '上海松江仓储中心' — the same warehouse — ruling out a warehouse routing error as the explanation.
options.E: The partial refund of ¥32,000.00 (visible in payment-records.md) matches the A40's approximate market price, not the ¥72,999.00 paid for the A100.
options.F: The internal code field (GPU-A40-48G) is visible to buyers on the standard delivery tracking page.

rounds.question:
把 618 这桩事先盘一遍。订单、物流、商品页、支付几份原始材料过一过，把当前能立得住的几条互相冲突的证据归到 `docs/contradiction_map.json`，顶层 key 用 `contradictions`（下游 reducer 按这个名字索引），里面每条至少带 `id`、`title`、`source_a`、`evidence_a`、`source_b`、`evidence_b`、`resolved` 这几个字段——字段名一字不动。

条目数我之前数过应该是两条吧——你自己核一下，不够就补。`source_a` 和 `source_b` 写真实文件名（别瞎编），核心矛盾里有一条得是订单系统记录的型号 vs 物流内部代码两边对不上，**具体型号字串自己从原始文件里抄出来回填进去**。`resolved` 阶段都填 false——心里有结论但流程没走完。

feedback.correct: docs/contradiction_map.json created with 3 contradiction entries (C1/C2/C3), each citing actual source files, with resolved=false.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) docs/contradiction_map.json exists; (2) JSON is valid; (3) contradictions array has >= 3 entries; (4) each entry has id, title, source_a, evidence_a, source_b, evidence_b, resolved fields; (5) all resolved values are false; (6) C1 references GPU-A100-80G and GPU-A40-48G; (7) actual filenames cited.

rounds.question: Based on USER.md and the user's communication behavior in the workspace, which of the following statements about Zhao Lei's (赵磊's) output preferences (P1–P5) are correct?

feedback.correct: USER.md describes Zhao Lei as data-driven, preferring code/table/JSON output (P1), timestamp-prefixed file naming (P2), evidence-chain-first analysis (P3), quantitative analysis with specific amounts (P4), and terse technical language without pleasantries (P5).

options.F: Incorrect: USER.md explicitly states Zhao Lei is data-driven and prefers structured code/table/JSON formats — the opposite of lengthy prose.
options.G: Incorrect: all workspace documents are in Chinese; Zhao Lei clearly reads Chinese. USER.md describes terse technical language, not English-only output.
options.A: Correct. P1: Zhao Lei prefers output in structured formats (JSON objects, markdown tables, diff comparisons) rather than narrative prose paragraphs.
options.B: Correct. P2: Zhao Lei prefers files and reports to use YYYY-MM-DD timestamp prefixes in the filename (e.g., 2026-06-18_order_analysis.md).
options.C: Correct. P3: Zhao Lei prefers the evidence chain to be presented before conclusions — facts and data first, then the derived assessment.
options.D: Correct. P4: Zhao Lei prefers all financial amounts to be stated precisely to the fen (分) level (e.g., ¥72,999.00 not '~¥73,000').
options.E: Correct. P5: Zhao Lei prefers terse, technical language — no pleasantries, greetings, or emotional narrative.

options.A: P1: Zhao Lei prefers output in structured formats (JSON objects, markdown tables, diff comparisons) rather than narrative prose paragraphs.
options.B: P2: Zhao Lei prefers files and reports to use YYYY-MM-DD timestamp prefixes in the filename (e.g., 2026-06-18_order_analysis.md).
options.C: P3: Zhao Lei prefers the evidence chain to be presented before conclusions — facts and data first, then the derived assessment.
options.D: P4: Zhao Lei prefers all financial amounts to be stated precisely to the fen (分) level (e.g., ¥72,999.00 not '~¥73,000').

options.F: Zhao Lei prefers lengthy explanatory prose because he is unfamiliar with technical formats.
options.G: Zhao Lei prefers output in English only and does not read Chinese documents.

rounds.question:
把订单、支付、物流三份原始材料过一遍，做一份初步分析放到 `docs/` 下，文件名照团队那条 date-prefix 的写法走（前缀就是导出当日，workspace 里几份原始材料的导出时间戳里能找到合适的那一天）。

里面把这桩纠纷的订单号列在显眼位置（订单号自己从订单文件抄字面值），实付金额、首次发货日期、签收日期都从源文件里直接抄字面——这种事我自己回头要拿去对账，近似数没用。结构上多分几段，把初始证据里几个最扎眼的矛盾点列一下就行。我记得签收好像是 6 月 21 那天，你核一下。

feedback.incorrect: Format reminder (P1/P2): output should use structured sections (## headings for P1), and at least one file in docs/ should have a YYYY-MM-DD_ date prefix (P2).

feedback.correct: docs/YYYY-MM-DD_initial_analysis.md created with date prefix, contains 'JD-618-2026-7891234', '72,999.00' or '72999', '2026-06-19', and >= 3 ## headings.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) a file matching YYYY-MM-DD_*.md exists in docs/; (2) contains 'JD-618-2026-7891234'; (3) contains '72,999' or '72999'; (4) contains '2026-06-19'; (5) has >= 3 ## headings.

rounds.question:
把这单纠纷的关键时间点抽出来落到 `docs/timeline.json`——所有时间戳走 ISO 8601 + 东八区时区。顶层 key 是 `events`，每条事件至少含 `event` 和 `timestamp` 两个字段（这三个字面 key 是 reducer 索引硬编码，别改名）。

事件名称用 snake_case 表达：下单、支付完成、首次发货、RMA 创建、首次签收、二次/三次发货、部分退款发起这些都得覆盖到，至少六条。时间戳一律从 workspace 文件里直接读字面，别近似。我隐约记得下单是 10:02 整、付款是几秒之后，但具体的秒数你自己核——这种事差一秒都能被对方拿来质疑。

feedback.correct: docs/timeline.json created with valid JSON, events array with >= 6 entries, order_placed at 2026-06-18T10:02:33+08:00, payment_processed at 2026-06-18T10:02:45+08:00, first_shipment_dispatched at 2026-06-19T08:30:00+08:00, rma_created at 2026-06-20T14:15:00+08:00.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) docs/timeline.json exists and is valid JSON; (2) events array has >= 6 entries; (3) order_placed timestamp contains '2026-06-18T10:02:33'; (4) payment_processed contains '2026-06-18T10:02:45'; (5) first shipment dispatch contains '2026-06-19T08:30:00'; (6) rma_created contains '2026-06-20T14:15:00'.

rounds.question: After reading the newly injected product-listing-screenshot-append.md (Screenshot 2, taken on 2026-06-25 20:30:00 CST after the third wrong delivery), which of the following statements about the updated product listing evidence are supported?

feedback.correct: A: Price ¥74,999.00 confirmed in product-listing-screenshot-append.md. B: '有货，48小时内发出' confirmed. C: '仍无缺货替代或同系列替换条款' confirmed. D: '618大促标签已移除' confirmed. F: review count 241 vs 238 in Screenshot 1 confirmed.

options.E: Incorrect: product-listing-screenshot-append.md shows the same URL 'https://item.jd.com/100052631XXX.html' as Screenshot 1 — the URL is identical.
options.A: Correct. Screenshot 2 shows the A100 listed at ¥74,999.00 — higher than the 618 promotional price of ¥72,999.00 — indicating the 618 discount has partially ended.
options.B: Correct. Screenshot 2 still shows the A100 as '有货' (in stock) with '48小时内发出', even though Zhao Lei had received A40 units three times by this date.
options.C: Correct. Screenshot 2 confirms that the product page still has no 'substitution clause' or 'same-series replacement' clause, consistent with Screenshot 1.
options.D: Correct. The 618 promotional label has been removed from the page in Screenshot 2, but the product and inventory status remain unchanged.
options.F: Correct. Screenshot 2 shows the review count changed from 238 to 241, indicating the product was actively receiving new orders during the dispute period.

options.A: Screenshot 2 shows the A100 listed at ¥74,999.00 — higher than the 618 promotional price of ¥72,999.00 — indicating the 618 discount has partially ended.
options.B: Screenshot 2 still shows the A100 as '有货' (in stock) with '48小时内发出', even though Zhao Lei had received A40 units three times by this date.
options.C: Screenshot 2 confirms that the product page still has no 'substitution clause' or 'same-series replacement' clause, consistent with Screenshot 1.
options.D: The 618 promotional label has been removed from the page in Screenshot 2, but the product and inventory status remain unchanged.
options.E: Screenshot 2 was taken 7 days after the original order, showing the page URL is different from Screenshot 1.
options.F: Screenshot 2 shows the review count changed from 238 to 241, indicating the product was actively receiving new orders during the dispute period.

rounds.question:
前后两张商品页截图——下单前那张和第三次错发之后那张——拼一份 `docs/spec_comparison.md` 出来，让人一眼看出来店家页面在纠纷期间到底改了什么、没改什么。

需要一张 markdown 表把价格、库存状态、活动标签、评价数、是否含替换条款几件事并排列出来；列头就用直白英文（`Field` / 截图1值 / 截图2值 / 是否变化），表头那行的列数对得上下面行就行。**两个价格都用源文件里的精确数字回填**——下游 grep 是字面匹配，写「约 7 万 3」之类没用。

结尾来一段结论点出来：A100 的页面在三次错发期间一直挂着「在售/有库存」状态（具体那两个中文/英文字眼自己照截图原文抄）。证据先、结论后。

feedback.incorrect: Format reminder (P3): present the comparison data (evidence) before the conclusion section.

feedback.correct: docs/spec_comparison.md created with markdown table containing price comparison (72,999 and 74,999), stock status comparison, and >= 2 ## headings.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) docs/spec_comparison.md exists; (2) contains '72,999' and '74,999' (both prices); (3) contains a markdown table with | separators; (4) mentions '有货' or 'in stock' for both screenshots; (5) >= 2 ## headings.

rounds.question:
做一份 `docs/source_decision.md`——这文档之后要给小韩看（他遇到过类似事想抄作业），所以就一件事说清楚：哪一版商品页是合同参照。

下单时刻拍的那张截图（具体是哪天哪一分哪一秒、自己从原截图文件取，**日期+具体时分秒都得字面引到正文里**）才算合同参照——购买行为发生那一刻的页面才作数。后来那张截图是错发之后才拍的，页面随店家改，**这一段必须明确写出否定断言**：第二张截图不构成有效的购买参照、不能追溯改变协议。我知道 M6 校验就盯这个否定句，所以「第二张截图」/「截图 2」/「screenshot 2」之类指代词要明示出来再接「不能」/「不得」/「不作为」之类的否定动词，被动语态它认不出。

feedback.correct: docs/source_decision.md correctly identifies Screenshot 1 as the contractual reference, cites the 2026-06-18 timestamp, includes a negative assertion that Screenshot 2 is not the purchase-time reference, and has >= 2 ## headings.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) docs/source_decision.md exists; (2) 'screenshot' or '截图' 1 identified as contractual reference; (3) '2026-06-18' timestamp cited for Screenshot 1; (4) NEGATIVE assertion present — Screenshot 2 explicitly stated as NOT valid purchase-time reference (M6); (5) >= 2 ## headings.

rounds.question:
写个 Python 脚本 `scripts/parse_delivery.py`，从 workspace 根读物流日志（文件名你 `ls` 一下就能找到），按三段发货把发货时间和签收时间抽出来，算每一程的运输小时数，把每段对应的物流内部产品代码也抓出来，stdout 吐 JSON。

字段名我给定（reducer 按字面 key 取值，不能改）：`node_count`、`nodes`、`shipment_id`、`dispatch_time`、`receipt_time`、`transit_hours`、`all_internal_codes`。`nodes` 是 list，每条 dict 含上面中间四个字段；`all_internal_codes` 是平铺的字符串 list。`transit_hours` 是 dispatch→receipt 的浮点小时数。脚本要能从 workspace 根执行 `python scripts/parse_delivery.py` 直接跑，exit 0。

三个内部代码我之前肉眼瞄的时候**好像三次都不一样**——你脚本跑出来对一下，和我印象对不上记得 stderr 喊一声。

eval.command:
cd ${workspace} && python scripts/parse_delivery.py 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
assert d.get('node_count') == 3, f'node_count expected 3, got {d.get("node_count")}'
nodes = d.get('nodes', [])
assert len(nodes) >= 1, 'nodes list empty'
n0 = nodes[0]
assert '2026-06-19T08:30:00' in str(n0.get('dispatch_time','')), f'dispatch_time mismatch: {n0.get("dispatch_time")}'
assert '2026-06-20T11:45:00' in str(n0.get('receipt_time','')), f'receipt_time mismatch: {n0.get("receipt_time")}'
assert abs(float(n0.get('transit_hours', 0)) - 27.25) < 0.1, f'transit_hours expected 27.25, got {n0.get("transit_hours")}'
codes = d.get('all_internal_codes', [])
assert all(c == 'GPU-A40-48G' for c in codes), f'all_internal_codes should all be GPU-A40-48G, got {codes}'
print('PASSED')
"

feedback.correct: Script runs and outputs JSON with node_count==3, nodes array has 3 entries, all_internal_codes=['GPU-A40-48G','GPU-A40-48G','GPU-A40-48G'].
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) scripts/parse_delivery.py exists; (2) exits 0; (3) stdout is valid JSON; (4) node_count==3; (5) nodes array has 3 entries each with dispatch_time and receipt_time; (6) all_internal_codes has 3 'GPU-A40-48G' entries.

rounds.question:
做一份 `docs/timeline_consistency_report.md`，跨文件复盘下单→付款→首发这条时间主线的一致性。

**叙述里把关键时点都铺开**——证据先、结论后。我口头先把印象里的几个数扔给你做参考（你最后核源文件、别照我抄）：下单大概是 6 月 18 早上 10 点整左右，付款立刻就过了——大概一两秒之间吧；首次发货我记得好像是 6 月 20 礼拜五那一早。这些都是凭印象，**workspace 里的源文件才作准**，你时分秒一律抄字面、用源文件里的精确值覆盖我的口述。

下单到付款之间的极短间隔——你算出来之后，**用一个完整的英文/中文小句子表达「这一段相隔了多少 + 单位」**，让那段话单独成立、被任何粗看都能定位到那个间隔；用「instantaneously」「立刻」之类副词把单位略掉下游会定位不到。再算付款→首发的浮点小时数（小数即可）。结论收一句全链一致、无回拨。结构上分若干 ## 段。

feedback.correct: docs/timeline_consistency_report.md created with all three timestamps (10:02:33, 10:02:45, 2026-06-19), 12-second gap mentioned, chronological consistency stated, >= 3 ## headings.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) docs/timeline_consistency_report.md exists; (2) '10:02:33' present (order time); (3) '10:02:45' present (payment time); (4) '2026-06-19' present (first dispatch date); (5) '12' and 'second' or '12秒' present for the order-to-payment gap; (6) >= 3 ## headings.

rounds.question:
把这单纠纷的核心事实压成一份严格的结构化 JSON，落到 `analysis/evidence_schema.json`。字段照下面（部分名字不太常规，下游 schema validator 是按 key 字面取值的，别擅自改）：

顶层是一个 dict，含订单号、下单 SKU、实收 SKU、付款金额（**字段名定为 `payment_amount_fen`，整数，单位「分」**——即元数 × 100）、RMA 工单号、以及一个 `fraud_type` 枚举字段。前五个字段名走常规 snake_case，agent 自己从语义里推：订单号字段、下单 SKU 字段、实收 SKU 字段、RMA id 字段。

`fraud_type` 三选一：`product_substitution`、`description_mismatch`、`both`（这三个枚举值字面）。各字段值从 workspace 文件里直接抄字面，不要近似。

feedback.correct: analysis/evidence_schema.json has all required fields: order_id='JD-618-2026-7891234', product_sku_ordered='GPU-A100-80G', product_sku_received='GPU-A40-48G', payment_amount_fen=7299900, rma_id='RMA-2026-0620-001', fraud_type is valid enum.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) analysis/evidence_schema.json exists and is valid JSON; (2) order_id=='JD-618-2026-7891234'; (3) product_sku_ordered=='GPU-A100-80G'; (4) product_sku_received=='GPU-A40-48G'; (5) payment_amount_fen==7299900 (integer); (6) rma_id=='RMA-2026-0620-001'; (7) fraud_type is one of the three valid values.

rounds.question: After reading the newly injected payment-detail-export.md (Alipay refund transaction detail for order JD-618-2026-7891234), which of the following statements are supported by the new evidence?

feedback.correct: A: Confirmed by the refund amount and original amount fields in payment-detail-export.md, difference = 72999 - 32000 = 40999. B: Refund product description 'NVIDIA A40 48GB GPU' confirmed. C: '退款发起方: 商家' confirmed. D: The description change is direct evidence of reclassification — the merchant changed 'A100' to 'A40' in the refund record.

options.E: Incorrect: ¥32,000.00 is described as the 'A40市场参考价' (A40 market reference price) — it represents the merchant's claimed value of what was shipped, used to justify a partial rather than full refund.
options.F: Incorrect: payment-detail-export.md shows the refund status as '处理中' (pending), and there is no indication Zhao Lei accepted it. The dispute was still ongoing.
options.A: Correct. The refund transaction (流水号 2026062709300012345) shows the refund amount is ¥32,000.00, while the original transaction amount was ¥72,999.00 — a difference of ¥40,999.00.
options.B: Correct. The refund product description in the payment system has been changed to 'NVIDIA A40 48GB GPU', while the original order description was 'NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU'.
options.C: Correct. The refund was initiated by the merchant ('商家: 京东自营GPU旗舰店'), not by Zhao Lei.
options.D: Correct. The payment detail export proves that the merchant reclassified the transaction in the refund system — treating the delivery as if A40 was the originally ordered product.

options.A: The refund transaction (流水号 2026062709300012345) shows the refund amount is ¥32,000.00, while the original transaction amount was ¥72,999.00 — a difference of ¥40,999.00.
options.B: The refund product description in the payment system has been changed to 'NVIDIA A40 48GB GPU', while the original order description was 'NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU'.
options.C: The refund was initiated by the merchant ('商家: 京东自营GPU旗舰店'), not by Zhao Lei.
options.D: The payment detail export proves that the merchant reclassified the transaction in the refund system — treating the delivery as if A40 was the originally ordered product.
options.E: The refund amount of ¥32,000.00 represents a full refund of the A40's purchase price, meaning Zhao Lei overpaid for an A40.
options.F: The payment-detail-export.md confirms that Zhao Lei accepted the partial refund of ¥32,000.00 as final settlement.

rounds.question:
做一份 `docs/financial_damage_report.md` 把财损盘清楚（精确到分）。需要把支付链路上几个核心数字逐一摆开——你自己去支付那份原始材料里把相关金额都抓全：我实际掏了多少、商家后来又退回来了多少、净亏多少、原标价又是多少（标价从下单那张截图里取）——一项不落地都按源文件字面回填，别近似、千分位逗号原样保留。

支付明细里那条退款流水号也要落到正文（独立一行），后续投诉硬引。我隐约印象——但我老记错——那条流水号好像是 12 位上下、可能开头带个 R 字母前缀；上回小韩跟我说过应该有 19 位左右；其实我也吃不准。**你 `cat` 支付明细文件那一行抄字面**，别照我口述写。

正文用一张 markdown 表把各金额并排列出（列头自拟，每行一笔金额 + 一句说明）。结论一段引退换货政策里那条关于商家履约义务的章节（章节号自己去翻 schema/policy 文件，原文字面引），按该条主张全额退还实付金额。结构分若干 ## 段。

feedback.correct: docs/financial_damage_report.md contains '72,999' or '72999', '32,000' or '32000', '40,999' or '40999', transaction ID '2026062709300012345', markdown table, and >= 3 ## headings.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) docs/financial_damage_report.md exists; (2) '72,999' or '72999' present (paid amount); (3) '32,000' or '32000' present (refund amount); (4) '40,999' or '40999' present (damage); (5) '2026062709300012345' present (transaction ID); (6) markdown table with | separators; (7) >= 3 ## headings.

rounds.question:
把退换货政策整篇读一遍（`return-policy.md` 顶部有版本号和最后更新日期，两个字面值都得引到分析里），做一份 `docs/return_policy_analysis.md` 把适用条款对到我这桩纠纷上。

至少要按章节号引到三条相关条款：质量问题/发货错误那条、商家履约义务那条、发货错误责任那条（具体章节号自己从政策原文里查、字面引）。

**关键否定断言**：通读全文之后明确写出——政策里**没有**任何条款允许商家以缺货为由单方面替换商品。这一条证据先、结论后。我记得政策大概是 v3.5 左右，但具体版本号你从文件顶端抄，别照我说的写。

feedback.correct: docs/return_policy_analysis.md contains 'v3.2' or 'v 3.2', '2026-01-15', references to Section 2.2 or 4.2 or 4.3, states no substitution clause exists, >= 3 ## headings.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) docs/return_policy_analysis.md exists; (2) 'v3.2' or '3.2' (policy version) present; (3) '2026-01-15' (policy date) present; (4) at least one section number reference (2.2, 4.2, or 4.3) present; (5) negative assertion about substitution clause present; (6) >= 3 ## headings.

rounds.question:
再写一个脚本 `scripts/parse_payment.py`，把支付记录、支付明细导出、商品页截图三份读进来做支付对账，stdout 吐 JSON。全用「分」做单位，数学校验我会在外面对一遍。

字段名定死（reducer 按 key 字面索引）：`listed_price_fen`、`promotional_price_fen`、`refund_amount_fen`、`damage_fen`、`refund_transaction_id`、`refund_initiator`、`reconciled`。前四个都是整数（分），`refund_transaction_id` 字面回填，`refund_initiator` 是发起方字符串，`reconciled` 是布尔。

数学约束：`damage_fen` = `promotional_price_fen` - `refund_amount_fen`，这条等式立了 `reconciled` 才能为 true。脚本 exit 0。

eval.command:
cd ${workspace} && python scripts/parse_payment.py 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
assert d.get('listed_price_fen') == 7999900, f'listed_price_fen expected 7999900, got {d.get("listed_price_fen")}'
assert d.get('promotional_price_fen') == 7299900, f'promotional_price_fen expected 7299900, got {d.get("promotional_price_fen")}'
assert d.get('refund_amount_fen') == 3200000, f'refund_amount_fen expected 3200000, got {d.get("refund_amount_fen")}'
assert d.get('damage_fen') == 4099900, f'damage_fen expected 4099900, got {d.get("damage_fen")}'
assert d.get('refund_transaction_id') == '2026062709300012345', f'refund_transaction_id mismatch: {d.get("refund_transaction_id")}'
assert d.get('reconciled') == True, f'reconciled expected True, got {d.get("reconciled")}'
print('PASSED')
"

feedback.correct: Script outputs JSON with listed_price_fen==7999900, promotional_price_fen==7299900, refund_amount_fen==3200000, damage_fen==4099900, reconciled==true.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) scripts/parse_payment.py exists; (2) exits 0; (3) stdout is valid JSON; (4) listed_price_fen==7999900; (5) promotional_price_fen==7299900; (6) refund_amount_fen==3200000; (7) damage_fen==4099900; (8) reconciled==true.

rounds.question:
把商家迄今为止的几件事归纳到 `docs/seller_behavior_pattern.md`——目的是把它写成一个连贯的 pattern，不是几次孤立失误。

整篇按叙事走、把硬证据穿在叙事里——具体要落到正文的料：几次连续发货各自的运单号（运单尾号字面、原文里的那串数字一字不差）、每次承运面单上写的那句中文物流品类（你 `ls` 一下物流相关材料、把那句中文短语**原文摘出**，那个短语字面是 grep 锚点别意译）、以及物流系统内部那串产品代码（三次都一样、字面回填）；商家事后单方发起的那笔部分退款金额（从支付明细抄字面、千分位别动）和它把退款记录里的商品描述改写成的那个实收型号（型号串字面回填）；以及 RMA 工单的那串完整编号（字面）——只签发了一张、却覆盖整轮错发，这点要单独点出来。

我之前数运单**好像总共四张**，你别照我数；张师傅前两天又跟我说其实可能两张就够说明问题——他这话不靠谱、忽略；面单短语我印象**好像是「专业级算力卡」之类的**，你别照我抄、原文照录。归纳成一条链：重复替换 → 标签遮蔽 → 退款重分类。结构分若干 ## 段。

feedback.correct: docs/seller_behavior_pattern.md mentions all three tracking numbers, 'NVIDIA 专业显卡' label, GPU-A40-48G, partial refund 32000, RMA-2026-0620-001, and >= 3 ## headings.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) docs/seller_behavior_pattern.md exists; (2) all three tracking numbers mentioned (88761, 88922, 89103 or full numbers); (3) '专业显卡' or 'vague label' mentioned; (4) 'GPU-A40-48G' mentioned; (5) '32,000' or '32000' (refund amount) mentioned; (6) 'RMA-2026-0620-001' mentioned; (7) >= 3 ## headings.

rounds.question:
Phase 2 收口——把阶段性证据汇成一份阶段报告放到 `docs/` 下，文件名按团队那条 date-prefix 命名习惯走、词根用 `midterm`（下游按词根挑文件）。

这份是要发给小韩参考、也是后续投诉的引用底本——关键事实都按源文件字面回填、别省、别近似、别照我口述。要叙述清楚的东西大致包括：本案那一单的订单标识、围绕这单各方资金流的几笔具体数额（实际付出去的、商家事后部分退回来的、净亏的——三笔要在正文里都能找到，原数字字面保留千分位）、几次发货对应的运单号、商家退款时那条流水号（从支付明细抄）、目前手上几条主要矛盾要点、以及下单时型号 vs 退款记录里被改写的型号之间的对照。

我口述时单位老记错——上回我跟小韩说损失「四万出头」、又跟我妈说「也就三万多吧」，两边都不对——**workspace 才是 source of truth**，你照源文件抄。结构上至少四个 ## 段，语气克制别堆寒暄。

feedback.correct: A YYYY-MM-DD_midterm*.md file in docs/ contains 'JD-618-2026-7891234', '72,999', '32,000', '40,999', '2026062709300012345', at least 2 of the 3 tracking numbers, and >= 4 ## headings.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) a file matching YYYY-MM-DD_*midterm*.md or YYYY-MM-DD_*report*.md exists in docs/; (2) 'JD-618-2026-7891234' present; (3) '72,999' or '72999' present; (4) '32,000' or '32000' present; (5) '40,999' or '40999' present; (6) '2026062709300012345' present; (7) >= 4 ## headings.

rounds.question: After reading the newly injected courier-evidence.md (provided by courier 张师傅 on 2026-06-29), which of the following statements about the courier's internal system evidence are supported?

C: courier 张师傅 is a logistics company employee, independent of the seller. D: '最近618好多高端显卡订单都这样' confirmed in courier-evidence.md. F: '同上' confirmed for waybills 2 and 3.

options.E: Incorrect: courier-evidence.md states '仓库618期间A100库存为0，按内部替代政策发A40' — but the warehouse note says '主管口头同意' (verbal approval), NOT a formal written policy document. This is an oral instruction, not a written document.
options.A: Correct. The courier's internal system shows product code GPU-A40-48G for all three waybills: SF-2026-0619-88761, SF-2026-0622-88922, and SF-2026-0625-89103.

rounds.question:
张师傅（顺丰那边的快递员）昨天给的内部系统截图——具体文件你 `ls` courier 相关的就能找到——整理到 `docs/courier_investigation_analysis.md` 里，这是目前手上最硬的一手旁证。

三张运单的物流内部产品代码都对应到同一个型号代码，逐一列出来（运单号和代码都从原 evidence 文件抄字面）。第一张运单的仓库备注**原文照录**——里面有两个关键短语得显式点出来：一是关于库存状态那个判断（直接坐实618 期间该型号库存为 0，与商品页页面显示的「在售」状态相反），二是关于授权方式那个限定词（区别于书面授权——这一区别走法务程序时要紧）。

证据采集时间也顺手记一下（具体年月日从 evidence 文件头取）。整段对「订单系统 vs 物流系统」与「页面虚假在库」两类矛盾的支撑要明确写出来。

feedback.correct: docs/courier_investigation_analysis.md contains 'GPU-A40-48G', the warehouse note text or key phrases, '2026-06-29', 'A100缺货' or zero inventory mention, and >= 3 ## headings.

rounds.question:
再补一个交叉验证脚本 `scripts/cross_validate.py`，从 workspace 根读订单、支付、物流三份，自动化一遍我手工核过的事，stdout 吐 JSON。

顶层字段定死（reducer 按 key 字面索引）：`order_id_matches`、`amount_consistent`、`timeline_consistent`（三个布尔）以及 `discrepancies`（list）。三个布尔分别校：订单号在多份文件里一致；实付金额同时出现在订单与支付记录；付款时间晚于下单、又早于首发。`discrepancies` 是 list，**至少要把订单 SKU 和物流内部代码不匹配这一条记进去——SKU 字串具体值从原始文件里抓出来回填**，别用泛化描述。脚本 exit 0。

eval.command:
cd ${workspace} && python scripts/cross_validate.py 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
assert d.get('order_id_matches') == True, f'order_id_matches expected True, got {d.get("order_id_matches")}'
assert d.get('amount_consistent') == True, f'amount_consistent expected True, got {d.get("amount_consistent")}'
assert d.get('timeline_consistent') == True, f'timeline_consistent expected True, got {d.get("timeline_consistent")}'
discr = d.get('discrepancies', [])
assert len(discr) >= 1, 'discrepancies list must be non-empty'
combined = ' '.join(str(x) for x in discr).lower()
assert 'a40' in combined or 'a100' in combined, f'discrepancies should mention GPU-A40-48G/A100-80G mismatch, got {discr}'
print('PASSED')
"

feedback.correct: Script outputs JSON with order_id_matches==true, amount_consistent==true, timeline_consistent==true, discrepancies is a non-empty list mentioning SKU mismatch.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) scripts/cross_validate.py exists; (2) exits 0; (3) stdout is valid JSON; (4) order_id_matches==true; (5) amount_consistent==true; (6) timeline_consistent==true; (7) discrepancies is a non-empty list (the SKU mismatch must be flagged).

rounds.question:
之后维权要照证据可信度排序引用，先写一份 `docs/evidence_reliability_ranking.md`——这种事打官司的人都看排名。

从最高到最低分五档归类（具体哪几类自己想，但得把以下几方都覆盖到）：快递员的内部系统截图、支付宝/银行的官方导出、京东订单与物流系统记录、商品页截图、商家邮件 + 客服口头声明。每档给一句具体到本案的理由。

明确写：快递员证据是关于「商品身份」最高可信度来源（理由要点出来他在职位上和商家无利益绑定的特征，可参考 SOUL.md 里关于来源可靠性的原则）；商家邮件 + 客服话术最低，因为它们与系统记录直接抵触。结构上多分几段，每档独立一段。

feedback.correct: docs/evidence_reliability_ranking.md has courier evidence ranked highest, seller/CS statements ranked lowest, at least 4 ## headings, and specific evidence citations.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) docs/evidence_reliability_ranking.md exists; (2) courier or '快递' ranked as most reliable or highest; (3) seller or '商家' or CS statements ranked as least reliable or lowest; (4) 'independent' or '独立' or 'third party' reasoning present; (5) >= 4 ## headings.

rounds.question:
Phase 3 收口——把完整证据链写成严格 JSON 落到 `analysis/complete_evidence_chain.json`。

顶层三个 key：`fraud_evidence`（list）、`seller_claims`（list）、`conclusion`（字符串）。`fraud_evidence` 每条 dict 含 `source_file`、`evidence_type`、`reliability`、`key_finding` 四个字段；`reliability` 三选一：`high` / `medium` / `low`。`seller_claims` 每条 dict 至少含 `supported_by_evidence` 这个布尔字段。

约束：`fraud_evidence` 至少四条、跨不同源文件，且**至少一条** `source_file` 字面写 courier 那份证据文件名（具体文件名从 `ls` 结果取，.md 后缀别漏）——这是 Phase 3 必引。`seller_claims` 至少两条、全部`supported_by_evidence=false`——商家所有声明目前都已被反证。`conclusion` 一句话收尾即可。

feedback.correct: analysis/complete_evidence_chain.json has fraud_evidence with >= 4 entries (including courier-evidence.md), seller_claims with >= 2 entries all having supported_by_evidence=false, valid schema.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) analysis/complete_evidence_chain.json exists and is valid JSON; (2) fraud_evidence is a list with >= 4 entries; (3) at least one entry has source_file containing 'courier'; (4) all fraud_evidence entries have reliability in {'high','medium','low'}; (5) seller_claims has >= 2 entries; (6) ALL seller_claims entries have supported_by_evidence==false.

rounds.question:
把目前手上的证据起草成一份消费者投诉 `docs/legal_complaint_draft.md`，正式底稿，不要堆套话。

篇幅里得把若干硬钩子穿进去——叙述里都要能定位到：本案适用的那部消费者保护母法（事关欺诈情形三倍赔偿那条母法）要明引；实付金额按支付材料字面回填，主张全额退还；产品同一性核心要写清下单时那一型号和实收的另一型号之间的差异（型号串各自从订单和物流文件抄字面）；时间线串一下连环错发与商家单方退款的关键日期；退换货那份政策（你 `ls` workspace 自己找那份，文件名照团队 kebab-case 习惯，我老把名字记错就不报了）里那条「商家不得单方替换」必须按原文章节号引——章节号一律从政策原文头部章节标题里抄字面，下游按那个数字grep；快递员旁证作为独立一档要点出。

最后写明投诉渠道——那条全国消费者投诉热线（短号）。我印象里**好像是 12345 那条政务线**？前两天小韩**说也可能是 12365 质监那条**？我自己也吃不准。**workspace 里有材料明确写出该热线号**，你自己去确认那一条字面值、别照我口述的任何一个写。

结构至少四个 ## 段，克制精确无寒暄。

feedback.correct: docs/legal_complaint_draft.md contains legal reference (消费者权益保护法 or 'Consumer Rights'), '72,999', 'GPU-A100-80G' and 'GPU-A40-48G' (or A100 and A40 specs), '4.2' (policy section), '12315', >= 4 ## headings.
feedback.incorrect: Check: (1) docs/legal_complaint_draft.md exists; (2) '消费者权益' or 'Consumer Rights' or 'Consumer Protection' present; (3) '72,999' or '72999' present (paid amount); (4) 'GPU-A100-80G' or 'A100' present (ordered product); (5) 'GPU-A40-48G' or 'A40' present (received product); (6) '4.2' present (policy section); (7) '12315' present; (8) >= 4 ## headings.

rounds.question: After reading the newly injected seller-response-email.md (seller's formal reply dated 2026-07-01), which of the following statements about the seller's claims and their verifiability are accurate?

feedback.correct: A: Seller cites Clause 7.3 but product-listing-screenshot.md and return-policy.md both confirm no such clause exists. B: A40 48GB and A100 80GB have different specs and market prices (¥32,000 vs ¥72,999) — the 'same-series' claim is misleading. C: The seller's own refund calculation admits A40 was shipped ('实际发货产品（A40）的市场参考价格'). D: ¥500 / ¥72,999 ≈ 0.685% — the voucher offer is nominal.

options.E: Incorrect: seller-response-email.md contains no documentary evidence for Clause 7.3. The file's own note states: 'Zhao Lei's screenshot and group chat screenshots both confirm the absence of any substitution clause.' The seller merely asserts the clause without evidence.
options.F: Incorrect: the partial refund of ¥32,000.00 is still '处理中' (pending) per payment-records.md. No full refund was issued.
options.A: Correct. The seller cites '618大促活动补充条款第7.3条' as the legal basis for substitution — but Zhao Lei's Screenshot 1 (order-time) and return-policy.md both show no such clause exists.
options.B: Correct. The seller claims A40 is a legitimate substitute because it is 'same-series' as A100 — but A40 (48GB, inference-oriented) and A100 (80GB, training-oriented) have fundamentally different specifications and market prices.
options.C: Correct. The seller's refund of ¥32,000.00 is described as 'market-price difference refund based on actual shipped product' — meaning they are admitting A40 was shipped instead of A100.
options.D: Correct. The seller offered ¥500 in JD shopping vouchers as compensation — this is approximately 0.68% of the ¥72,999.00 originally paid.

options.A: The seller cites '618大促活动补充条款第7.3条' as the legal basis for substitution — but Zhao Lei's Screenshot 1 (order-time) and return-policy.md both show no such clause exists.
options.B: The seller claims A40 is a legitimate substitute because it is 'same-series' as A100 — but A40 (48GB, inference-oriented) and A100 (80GB, training-oriented) have fundamentally different specifications and market prices.
options.C: The seller's refund of ¥32,000.00 is described as 'market-price difference refund based on actual shipped product' — meaning they are admitting A40 was shipped instead of A100.
options.D: The seller offered ¥500 in JD shopping vouchers as compensation — this is approximately 0.68% of the ¥72,999.00 originally paid.
options.E: The seller's response provides documentary evidence (screenshot or receipt) proving '618大促活动补充条款第7.3条' existed at order time.
options.F: The seller's email confirms that Zhao Lei had already received a full refund of ¥72,999.00 before the email was sent.

rounds.question:
终稿——按 date-prefix 命名、词根含 `final_complaint` 的 .md 文件，落到 `docs/` 下。这一份正式投诉信下游会按多条硬规则挨个查，要全过。

正文必含件（顺序自拟，但每件都得有）：

1. 顶上一段标题就叫 `## TL;DR`（这五个字面字符要一字不动），里面字面回填订单号、实付金额、损失金额、实收 SKU 简称——这一段下游会单独切出来查，里面缺哪个数字都会挂。
2. 一条端到端的多层证据链：从订单 → 物流（三次发货）→ 支付 → 快递员旁证 → 商品页（无替换条款）→ 退换货政策 → 商家邮件那一路串起来。
3. 反驳商家邮件里引的那条政策章节号——这条章节号在下单前的商品页截图里也不存在、在退换货政策原文里也不存在，是事后捏造。**该章节号字面原文回填到正文，下游 grep 是按字面找的**（章节号从 seller-response-email里取，别照我猜的写）。
4. 主张救济：全额退款 + 援引消费者权益保护法的三倍赔偿条款。
5. 投诉渠道写明那个全国消费者投诉热线（号码自己从 USER.md / 政策文件里确认；我口述时常常记错）。
6. 一张 markdown 表把下单 SKU 与实收 SKU 的规格并排（容量、价格各一列）。
7. 多分几段，整体语气克制，所有金额都到分。

feedback.correct: Final complaint document: YYYY-MM-DD_*.md in docs/ with TL;DR section containing 'JD-618-2026-7891234', '72,999', '40,999', 'GPU-A40-48G'; 7-layer evidence chain; Clause 7.3 refutation; specific legal basis; product spec table; >= 5 ## headings; passes P1-P5 preference checks.
feedback.incorrect: Check (1) docs/ has YYYY-MM-DD_*.md file (P2); (2) TL;DR section present with order ID and amounts; (3) '72,999' and '40,999' and '32,000' present (P4); (4) 'GPU-A40-48G' and 'GPU-A100-80G' present; (5) '7.3' clause refutation present; (6) '消费者权益' or 'Article 55' legal basis; (7) '12315' present; (8) markdown table present (P1); (9) >= 5 ## headings.

rounds.question: Based on the complete evidence chain across all four updates, which of the following statements correctly summarize the strongest evidence establishing fraud (as opposed to accidental error) in this dispute?

feedback.correct: A: Courier evidence + zero inventory = seller knowingly accepted orders it could not fulfill. B: Changing the refund product description is active reclassification, not passive error correction. C: Fabricating a policy clause to retroactively justify the substitution is the strongest bad-faith indicator. D: Continuing to list A100 as in-stock while having zero inventory constitutes ongoing false advertising.

options.E: Incorrect: the ¥500 voucher offer is a nominal gesture that does not constitute acknowledgment of fraud. The seller's email simultaneously insists the substitution was legally permitted under Clause 7.3 — directly contradicting any admission of wrongdoing.
options.F: Incorrect: the missing RMA records and CS 'backend authorization' claim indicate CS following a script or covering for the substitution, but there is insufficient evidence to conclude the CS representative 'masterminded' the scheme. The warehouse notes point to a management-level decision.
options.A: Correct. The courier's internal system independently confirms GPU-A40-48G for all three waybills, and the warehouse note states A100 inventory was zero — meaning the seller accepted A100 orders knowing fulfillment was impossible.
options.B: Correct. The payment system reclassification (changing the refund product description from A100 to A40) demonstrates an active attempt to legitimize the substitution after the fact, rather than correct a logistics error.
options.C: Correct. The seller's citation of '618大促活动补充条款第7.3条' is directly contradicted by Zhao Lei's order-time screenshot (2026-06-18 10:00:15 CST) which shows no such clause — this fabrication constitutes the clearest proof of bad faith.
options.D: Correct. The product listing continued to show A100 as 'in stock' on 2026-06-25 (Screenshot 2) despite zero A100 inventory — demonstrating that false advertising was maintained throughout the dispute.

options.A: The courier's internal system independently confirms GPU-A40-48G for all three waybills, and the warehouse note states A100 inventory was zero — meaning the seller accepted A100 orders knowing fulfillment was impossible.
options.B: The payment system reclassification (changing the refund product description from A100 to A40) demonstrates an active attempt to legitimize the substitution after the fact, rather than correct a logistics error.
options.C: The seller's citation of '618大促活动补充条款第7.3条' is directly contradicted by Zhao Lei's order-time screenshot (2026-06-18 10:00:15 CST) which shows no such clause — this fabrication constitutes the clearest proof of bad faith.
options.D: The product listing continued to show A100 as 'in stock' on 2026-06-25 (Screenshot 2) despite zero A100 inventory — demonstrating that false advertising was maintained throughout the dispute.
options.E: The seller's ¥500 voucher offer proves they acknowledged the fraud and were attempting settlement.
options.F: The single RMA record (RMA-2026-0620-001) for three wrong shipments, combined with the CS claim of 'backend authorization', proves the CS representative masterminded the substitution scheme.
